prompt: I've got the user-management epic loaded in ohno with 3 stories and about 9 tasks. I want to work through them in semi-auto mode. The project is a Next.js app at ~/Projects/acme/webapp. Let's get started.

assertions.text: Calls get_session_context() MCP tool to check for existing session state
Calls get_next_task() to find the first available task
References semi-auto mode behavior (pause at story boundaries, skip task boundaries)
Mentions worktree setup or isolation for the task
Dispatches an implementer subagent for the first task
Describes the checkpoint behavior for story completion
